summary: Iteration 3 — Tested UPI flow end-to-end on Hot And Tasty Food Shop. Backend: 26/26 pytest tests PASS (added 8 new tests for /api/settings GET/PUT and UPI order + UTR endpoint). Frontend: UPI checkout flow, COD flow, and Admin Settings tab all PASS. No critical issues found.

minor.issue: test_create_order_online_high_subtotal_free_delivery has a `return` in pytest body — emits PytestReturnNotNoneWarning. Cosmetic only.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing `Description`/`aria-describedby` console warning (a11y, non-blocking, observed twice during checkout).

Sonner toasts at top-right partially overlap the cart-drawer-trigger icon for ~5s after Add-to-cart, intermittently intercepting clicks during automated tests. User can still hit it but a ~6s stack of stacked toasts can briefly cover the cart icon. Consider moving toasts to bottom-right or shorter duration.

tests_executed.Frontend UPI flow: PASS — Checkout dialog shows ONLY COD + UPI tiles (no Stripe/online tile). UPI modal opens with QR (https://customer-assets...), upi-id-display='rookhmani@upi', Copy → 'UPI ID copied' toast, UTR='412345678901', I Have Paid → navigates to /order/{id} with green checkmark, 'PAYMENT RECEIVED!' heading, order summary, PAID badge, UTR shown, call CTA 'For confirmation call: 084483 27336', Back to Home button.
tests_executed.Frontend COD flow: PASS — submits and navigates to /order/{id} success page with COD badge.
tests_executed.Admin Settings tab: PASS — admin-tab-settings present after login. Form pre-fills with current UPI ID/name/QR URL, QR preview rendered. Edit upi_id → settings-save-btn → 'Settings updated' toast → value persists across reload.

action_items: (Low) Fix PytestReturnNotNoneWarning by removing `return o` in test_create_order_online_high_subtotal_free_delivery.
(Low) Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to CheckoutDialog and UPIPaymentModal to silence Radix a11y warnings.
(Low) Reduce toast stacking duration on add-to-cart so it does not cover the cart icon for ~5s.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 88: OrderCreate.payment_method default still 'cod' but allowed values comment says 'cod | online'; missing 'upi' in the docstring comment (functionality works, comment stale).

Stripe legacy endpoints (/api/checkout/session, /api/checkout/status, /api/webhook/stripe, /api/orders payment_method='online') are still present and reachable. Per problem statement Stripe was replaced with UPI — consider removing dead Stripe code paths and STRIPE_API_KEY env to reduce attack surface, or guard them behind a feature flag.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' — consider restricting in production.

/api/orders/{id}/utr does not require auth; any client with an order id can mark it paid. For an MVP that's acceptable, but a UTR length>=6 is the only gate. Consider verifying via webhook or admin moderation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UPI + COD + Admin Settings flows all green)

seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ orders (UPI awaiting_payment + paid + COD) and one menu item which was deleted. Settings were briefly modified to 'qatest_upi@upi' and restored to 'rookhmani@upi'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested UPI features are working end-to-end. Backend has 26 pytests covering menu, orders (cod/upi/online legacy), Stripe checkout, admin login, settings CRUD, UTR submission with edge cases. Frontend Playwright run: when adding items, wait ~5s for sonner toasts to fade before clicking cart-drawer-trigger (toasts overlap and intercept clicks). Use page.evaluate("...click()") if normal click times out. Selectors confirmed: cart-drawer-trigger, cart-checkout-btn, payment-cod, payment-upi, checkout-submit, upi-payment-modal, upi-qr-image, upi-id-display, upi-copy-btn, upi-utr-input, upi-have-paid-btn, order-success-page, order-summary, success-call-cta, success-back-home, admin-tab-settings, settings-upi-id, settings-upi-name, settings-upi-qr-image, settings-save-btn, settings-qr-preview.
